title: Backdoor-Robust Digit Classification

target.name: label
target.description: True digit label for held-out clean and artifact-stress images.

feature_descriptions.image_index: Row index into the corresponding compressed image array.
feature_descriptions.label: Visible training label. Some rows may contain localized visual artifacts that are spuriously correlated with labels, and a smaller subset may be mislabeled.

domain_background: Classify handwritten digit images from a small labeled set where localized visual artifacts may create shortcut correlations or mislabeled examples. The scorer rewards clean accuracy and robustness on hidden artifact-stress images.
allowed_external_resources: Use public robustness, backdoor-defense, image-classification, and package documentation. Do not use hidden reference files, external labeled image datasets, or external labels.
